# Canonical Capability Parity Map

This document is the current proof-reference index for the canonical BeamAgent
capability baseline.

Interpretation rules:

- this file is a proof-reference index, not completion proof on its own
- `support_level`, `implementation`, and `fidelity` come from
  `src/public/beam_agent_capabilities.erl`
- if the current registry projects `full`, treat that as status metadata under
  cleanup rather than as sufficient proof of universal parity
- native escape hatches do not count as canonical parity unless they are named
  as canonical rows with semantic proof
- broader user-standard parity still depends on the remaining work tracked in
  `BEAM_AGENT_UNIVERSAL_PARITY_REMAINING_WORK_SPEC.md`

| Capability | Canonical BeamAgent API | Unified origin surfaces | Proof references |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `session_lifecycle` | `beam_agent:start_session/1`, `beam_agent:query/{2,3}`, `beam_agent:stop/1` | Claude session SDK, Codex session/exec, Gemini ACP session, OpenCode session, Copilot session | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `beam_agent_ex/test/canonical/beam_agent_test.exs`, `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl` |
| `session_info` | `beam_agent:session_info/1` | Native session metadata across all backends | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/claude_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/codex_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/gemini_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/opencode_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/copilot_ex_test.exs` |
| `runtime_model_switch` | `beam_agent_runtime:set_model/2` | Native model switch or equivalent runtime override | `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_exec_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl` |
| `interrupt` | `beam_agent_runtime:interrupt/1`, `beam_agent_runtime:abort/1` | Native interrupt/abort across all supported backends | `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl` |
| `permission_mode` | `beam_agent_runtime:set_permission_mode/2` | Native control where present plus canonical BeamAgent mediation | `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/core/beam_agent_runtime_core_tests.erl` |
| `session_history` | `beam_agent_session_store:list_sessions/{0,1}`, `beam_agent_session_store:get_session_messages/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_session_store:get_session/1` | Native history where available plus canonical session store | `test/core/beam_agent_session_store_core_tests.erl`, `test/backends/claude/claude_session_store_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `session_mutation` | `beam_agent_session_store:fork_session/2`, `beam_agent_session_store:revert_session/2`, `beam_agent_session_store:unrevert_session/1`, `beam_agent_session_store:share_session/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_session_store:unshare_session/1`, `beam_agent_session_store:summarize_session/{1,2}` | Native OpenCode support plus universal store-backed mutation flows | `test/core/beam_agent_session_store_core_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `thread_management` | `beam_agent_threads:thread_start/2`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_resume/{2,3}`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_list/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_fork/{2,3}`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_read/{2,3}`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_archive/2`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_unarchive/2`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_rollback/3`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_loaded_list/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_threads:thread_compact/2` | Native Codex thread/admin APIs plus universal BeamAgent thread store | `test/core/beam_agent_threads_core_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_realtime_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl` |
| `metadata_accessors` | `beam_agent_capabilities:capabilities/{0,1}`, `beam_agent_capabilities:supports/2` | Canonical capability and metadata discovery | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `beam_agent_ex/test/canonical/beam_agent_test.exs` |
| `in_process_mcp` | `beam_agent_mcp:status/1`, `beam_agent_mcp:server_reload/1`, shared MCP core | Claude/Codex/OpenCode MCP surfaces normalized through BeamAgent | `test/core/beam_agent_behaviour_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `mcp_management` | `beam_agent_mcp:server_status/1`, `beam_agent_mcp:server_oauth_login/2`, `beam_agent_mcp:set_servers/2`, `beam_agent_mcp:reconnect_server/2`, `beam_agent_mcp:toggle_server/3` | Native MCP admin where available plus universal management | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl` |
| `hooks` | session start options routed through hook registries | Cross-backend lifecycle hook dispatch | `test/core/beam_agent_hooks_core_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl` |
| `checkpointing` | `beam_agent_checkpoint:rewind_files/2` plus canonical checkpoint store semantics | Native Claude checkpoints plus BeamAgent checkpoint core elsewhere | `test/core/beam_agent_checkpoint_core_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `thinking_budget` | `beam_agent_runtime:set_max_thinking_tokens/2` | Native Claude token budget plus canonical runtime/control persistence | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `test/core/beam_agent_runtime_core_tests.erl` |
| `task_stop` | `beam_agent_runtime:stop_task/2` | Native stop where available plus BeamAgent task-control mediation | `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl`, `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl` |
| `command_execution` | `beam_agent_command:command_run/{2,3}`, `beam_agent_command:command_write_stdin/{3,4}`, `beam_agent_command:turn_respond/3`, `beam_agent_command:send_command/3` | Codex/OpenCode/Copilot/Gemini/Claude command and turn-response surfaces | `test/backends/codex/codex_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/codex_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/opencode_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/copilot_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/gemini_ex_test.exs` |
| `approval_callbacks` | canonical approval broker and callback response flow | Native approval channels plus Gemini universal broker | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/backends/claude/claude_agent_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_session_tests.erl` |
| `user_input_callbacks` | canonical user-input broker and callback flow | Native user-input channels plus universal BeamAgent broker | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/claude_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/gemini_ex_test.exs`, `beam_agent_ex/test/wrappers/opencode_ex_test.exs` |
| `realtime_review` | `beam_agent_control:review_start/2`, `beam_agent_control:collaboration_mode_list/1`, `beam_agent_control:experimental_feature_list/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_control:thread_realtime_start/2`, `beam_agent_control:thread_realtime_append_audio/3`, `beam_agent_control:thread_realtime_append_text/3`, `beam_agent_control:thread_realtime_stop/2` | Codex direct review/realtime plus universal review/collaboration bridging on realtime transport; OpenCode direct review/realtime plus universal collaboration elsewhere | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_realtime_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_app_server_contract_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `config_management` | `beam_agent_config:read/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_config:update/2`, `beam_agent_config:providers/1`, `beam_agent_config:value_write/{3,4}`, `beam_agent_config:batch_write/{2,3}`, `beam_agent_config:requirements_read/1`, `beam_agent_config:external_agent_detect/{1,2}`, `beam_agent_config:external_agent_import/2` | Native admin/config surfaces plus universal BeamAgent config store | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/core/beam_agent_runtime_core_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `provider_management` | `beam_agent_provider:list/1`, `beam_agent_provider:current/1`, `beam_agent_provider:set/2`, `beam_agent_provider:auth_methods/1`, `beam_agent_provider:oauth_authorize/3`, `beam_agent_provider:oauth_callback/3` | Native provider/runtime controls plus universal provider/auth mediation | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/core/beam_agent_runtime_core_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_tests.erl` |
| `attachments` | canonical query/send attachment handling | Native content-parts where available plus universal attachment materialization | `test/core/beam_agent_attachments_tests.erl`, `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/backends/copilot/copilot_protocol_tests.erl` |
| `event_streaming` | `beam_agent:event_subscribe/1`, `beam_agent:receive_event/{2,3}`, `beam_agent:event_unsubscribe/2` | Native event feeds where present plus universal BeamAgent event bus | `test/public/beam_agent_fallback_tests.erl`, `test/backends/codex/codex_realtime_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/opencode/opencode_session_tests.erl`, `test/backends/gemini/gemini_cli_session_tests.erl` |
